design_style: Soft-Focus Ethereal / Organic Minimalist / Fluid Gradient Art

color_palette.background_logic: Dynamic mesh gradients with high Gaussian blur (60px+) and soft color bleeding

typography.header_font_style: Geometric Sans-Serif / Medium to Bold Weight
typography.layout_logic: Centered Hero Typography / Bottom-Left anchored text
text_effects: Soft anti-aliasing for maximum legibility on vibrant backgrounds

textures: Fluid, liquid-like transitions between color steps

compositional_rules.depth: Multi-layered Gaussian blur for ambient background depth
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Information presented via high-contrast white text directly against saturated mid-tone backgrounds
compositional_rules.alignment: Strict center-axis for hero messaging; flush-left for detailed metadata
